scenario.name: bot_hold_caller
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:sipp-bothold@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:sipp-bothold@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 9000 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch]-ack Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:sipp-bothold@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:sipp-bothold@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687638 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 9000 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=recvonly

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:sipp-bothold@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687639 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 9000 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendrecv
